name: Sausage-Cheese Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 pound bulk pork sausage (or ground meat of your choice)
1/2 pound sharp Cheddar cheese - finely grated
1 teaspoon cayenne pepper, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl and mix well using your hands.
2. Roll the mixture into balls about 1 inch in diameter. Place these on a lightly greased baking sheet about 1+1/2 inches apart.
3. Bake at 375°F for 15 to 20 minutes, turning them over after 10 minutes.
4. Drain on paper towels and serve warm. Makes 5 to 6 dozen.
